就係咁樣由一開始既1日覆我1-2次，到後來既keep住傾，而我都開始真係想同佢做朋友，咁我地就約左出黎旺角食牛，由見面嗰下我已經覺得佢好特別，跟住同左佢去貓cafe,我地面對面坐我全程偷望佢，佢係我眼中真係好完美好完美，我幫佢影左張相（依加我仲keep住），返到屋企都仲要睇張相諗佢，我知我開始鐘意佢（佢當時有男朋友）。
我地跟住都有keep住wts 不停分享on9片比對方睇，咁我就平均11點會訓，跟住朝早6點起身一開wts就一定見到係佢腥左好多好笑野比我睇，過左幾日佢同男朋友分左手，佢不停sad我不停哄，但冇用既，我都忍唔住同佢講我係鐘意佢，但佢拒絕左我，佢話最起碼都相處一輪先，咁我話好，跟住我地都keep住一星期最起碼見一次，一直咁樣過左4個月後既8月，我忍唔住同佢表白，佢都係拒絕我，佢話認為我未準備好（佢話我未準備好原因：太小朋友）咁我都認我真係好小朋友，只要佢幾個鐘都唔覆我我唔開心就hea佢比說話佢聽，佢每一次都啊媽教仔咁同我講道理，前前後後同一情況我諗多過一次，有一次出去我見到佢全程都成日睇電話，咁我就好好奇到底邊個咁勁令佢不停睇，原來係佢ex,wts置頂又係佢ex,我嗰下真係灰左，返到去我問佢係咪根本未散，佢話唔係咁我都信，佢都叫過我唔好再係咁小朋友去諗呢啲無謂野佢話如果再係咁佢真係唔會理我，去到9月頭有一日同佢出去，我見到佢係到覆wts我見到又係佢個ex,咁其實都冇咩野好正常，到後一日佢出街，佢成2個鐘先覆我2-3個字咁，我個心就好唔舒服我忍唔住話佢再忙都冇可能忙到咁，點解同我出就不停覆ex同其他人人出就唔理我，我仲要講左句我以後都唔會再理呢樣野，結果過左2個鐘佢覆我唔洗再傾佢會消失，跟住就block晒我，我換個電話wts佢，佢覆左我受夠2個字，跟住又block左我，當我見到受夠呢2個字個下我好心痛，我明明講過要照顧佢，要佢開開心心，但最後我令佢講出受夠2個字 我好失敗。
我不停諗返好多同佢既回憶，我好記得，有一次我車佢去屯門，佢係我車入面面向我我訓著左，我不停偷望佢，我同自己講要記得呢一秒，因為唔知以後會唔會失去佢，我不停望 嗰一刻佢就係我既全部。
我到依加仲記得清清楚楚
但我仲係接受唔到佢突然既消失
過左2日我已經feel到自己唔對路成個人dup晒，我拿拿聲去睇醫生食藥我先至訓到教
我不停諗同佢去食過既餐廳，去過既機鋪，玩過既遊戲，一諗我就流眼淚，返工做野做到一半又走出去喊，放lunch又自己坐後巷喊，同佢做過既野變晒我既陰影，我真係接受唔到佢就咁消失，我依加回想返，其實一切都係我自己拎黎，我衰在經驗唔夠不停做錯事，我依加終於學識點樣去愛一個人，但好可惜佢已經唔係我身邊....
我仍然好鐘意你WST，對唔住，要令你講出受夠2個字..我愛你

Btw 睇完你應該都知道我衰係邊 祝你成功
我就返去抹眼淚lu

In terms of personality, some men like kind-hearted and helpful women, some like compassionate women, some like them sociable and talkative, some like them quiet, some like them tactful and diplomatic, some like to be controlled and dominated and so on. 我19
佢23
有一日佢係ig開左po話有好多on9野想分享問有冇人睇，咁我平時都好中意睇我就覆佢：係咪有on9野睇，跟住佢留左電話比我跟住wts腥左好多片比我睇。
就係咁樣由一開始既1日覆我1-2次，到後來既keep住傾，而我都開始真係想同佢做朋友，咁我地就約左出黎旺角食牛，由見面嗰下我已經覺得佢好特別，跟住同左佢去貓cafe,我地面對面坐我全程偷望佢，佢係我眼中真係好完美好完美，我幫佢影左張相（依加我仲keep住），返到屋企都仲要睇張相諗佢，我知我開始鐘意佢（佢當時有男朋友）。
我地跟住都有keep住wts 不停分享on9片比對方睇，咁我就平均11點會訓，跟住朝早6點起身一開wts就一定見到係佢腥左好多好笑野比我睇，過左幾日佢同男朋友分左手，佢不停sad我不停哄，但冇用既，我都忍唔住同佢講我係鐘意佢，但佢拒絕左我，佢話最起碼都相處一輪先，咁我話好，跟住我地都keep住一星期最起碼見一次，一直咁樣過左4個月後既8月，我忍唔住同佢表白，佢都係拒絕我，佢話認為我未準備好（佢話我未準備好原因：太小朋友）咁我都認我真係好小朋友，只要佢幾個鐘都唔覆我我唔開心就hea佢比說話佢聽，佢每一次都啊媽教仔咁同我講道理，前前後後同一情況我諗多過一次，有一次出去我見到佢全程都成日睇電話，咁我就好好奇到底邊個咁勁令佢不停睇，原來係佢ex,wts置頂又係佢ex,我嗰下真係灰左，返到去我問佢係咪根本未散，佢話唔係咁我都信，佢都叫過我唔好再係咁小朋友去諗呢啲無謂野佢話如果再係咁佢真係唔會理我，去到9月頭有一日同佢出去，我見到佢係到覆wts我見到又係佢個ex,咁其實都冇咩野好正常，到後一日佢出街，佢成2個鐘先覆我2-3個字咁，我個心就好唔舒服我忍唔住話佢再忙都冇可能忙到咁，點解同我出就不停覆ex同其他人人出就唔理我，我仲要講左句我以後都唔會再理呢樣野，結果過左2個鐘佢覆我唔洗再傾佢會消失，跟住就block晒我，我換個電話wts佢，佢覆左我受夠2個字，跟住又block左我，當我見到受夠呢2個字個下我好心痛，我明明講過要照顧佢，要佢開開心心，但最後我令佢講出受夠2個字 我好失敗。
我不停諗返好多同佢既回憶，我好記得，有一次我車佢去屯門，佢係我車入面面向我我訓著左，我不停偷望佢，我同自己講要記得呢一秒，因為唔知以後會唔會失去佢，我不停望 嗰一刻佢就係我既全部。
我到依加仲記得清清楚楚
但我仲係接受唔到佢突然既消失
過左2日我已經feel到自己唔對路成個人dup晒，我拿拿聲去睇醫生食藥我先至訓到教
我不停諗同佢去食過既餐廳，去過既機鋪，玩過既遊戲，一諗我就流眼淚，返工做野做到一半又走出去喊，放lunch又自己坐後巷喊，同佢做過既野變晒我既陰影，我真係接受唔到佢就咁消失，我依加回想返，其實一切都係我自己拎黎，我衰在經驗唔夠不停做錯事，我依加終於學識點樣去愛一個人，但好可惜佢已經唔係我身邊....
我仍然好鐘意你WST，對唔住，要令你講出受夠2個字..我愛你

Btw 睇完你應該都知道我衰係邊 祝你成功

replies.msg: My friend John is a Pisces while his girlfriend is a Gemini. He's faithful to his girlfriend and would never cheat on her. When he broke up with his ex, he was pushed over the edge. Even when a stranger talked to him there was an edge of hostility to his voice. But as soon as he had a new relationship target, it took the edge of his emotional upset. His ex is a swimming champion who easily outshines me and him in any swimming styles. She's tall and shapely who definitely has the edge over lots of swimmers. Recently, he got into a brawl with a guy who was hitting on his girlfriend. The police showed up later and jealousy was assigned as the motive for the brawl. They dined in a hotel's restaurant recently. They queued outside the restaurant for an hour. The queue was so big that it stretched from the counter through the lobby area and out the main entrance of the hotel. A stout man pushed in the queue but was caught lol. I popped over to their home and visited them. The shuttle bus queue for their residential estate was so huge stretching down the road to the furthest mini bus stop. I waited in line for half an hour until three shuttle buses came along at once. In the meantime, some people mistook this long line for the line for other places. A couple came up and asked "are you in the queue for Cluny Park?" to make sure that it's the right queue. A stout man cut in line but people ignored it. Later a slim guy jumped the queue. The lady behind him said "Excuse me. The end of the queue is back there." A woman stood beside a guy who was midway through the queue. Pretending to look at her phone, she edged furtively behind him who didn't realise she was there. Some people might have noticed it but ignored it. When I saw John yesterday, he seemed on edge. It turns out that he has a job interview tomorrow. Never has he felt so on edge before an interview. His brother sometimes takes a nap at lunchtime because he has so much work to do that he feels drained. He usually snoozes on the sofa or at his desk by the fireplace when everyone else's eating lunch outside. He once brought his work along to a library where he dozed off at the table. Having a doze especially in front of the fire is a marvelous way to recharge your energy though. His sister has just completed her PhD at Tokyo University and is on the way to becoming a professor. Japan's on the way to becoming the world's strongest economy.
中秋快樂

replies.msg: My friend Charles is a Pisces whereas his girlfriend is an Aquarius. He's faithful to her and would never cheat on her. He lives on The Peak and owns many houses. Unlike Mayweather, he's never ostentatious though extremely wealthy. You can find out how ostentatious Mayweather's lifestyle is on YouTube such as his car collection and house collection. Leonardo is also quite ostentatious. He always wears ostentatious jewellery such as gold necklaces, rings and silver bracelets. He loves driving flashy cars and wearing flashy clothes. Do you remember the incident in Langham Place where the escalator stopped and reversed direction at a speed two to three times as fast as normal, causing people to fall and pile up at the base of the escalator? People were screaming as they tumbled down the escalator. Some people managed to grab the handrails and steady themselves. The incident occasioned a good deal of worry. When you were in primary and secondary school, were there any subjects that you weren't interested in so didn't engage much during the classes? I remember I didn't really engage in Chinese class. I was often daydreaming. Charles loves video games. I remember him playing Counterstrike in which he used a gun to single-handedly engage ninety nine enemies who only had knives lol. By the way, he hadn't heard from his cousin for years until this morning when he received a call from him. They chatted in exquisite delight. His younger brother is currently a head chef at a five star hotel and he feels he's found his niche. His younger sister too has found her niche as a professor having worked as a researcher for three years. His cousin is robust and healthy. He does lots of strength and conditioning exercises in his robust trainers. After his gym session, he usually drinks a cup of robust coffee and a glass or robust wine. He lives in Korea where the political system and economy are robust. Both of us are kickboxing fans. Like swimming, it requires an exquisite sense of timing. It used to be huge in Japan but today it's most popular in the United States but as popular in the global scheme of things. He said he wanted to train kickboxing privately rather than in a kickboxing club so he engaged a training partner to train with him instead. The residential estate Charles lives in consists of houses rather than flats. Each house has at least one retractable awning or canopy. The canopy could be made of cloth, glass, steel, stainless steel or concrete. In his garden, his planted a lychee tree, a mango tree and bushes. He also grew lots of flowers such as roses and orchids. He mows the grass every now and then. He sometimes hires a gardener to manicure his garden.
